description: Composition White round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with the adidas patented 3-Stripe running from the shoulder to cuff and embroidered branding on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately at less than 30 degrees Do not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Cool iron; do not iron on print/trims/logo Classic adidas t-shirt for men. This tee promises exemplary comfort with its luxe fabric. Smart enough to wear with a jacket. Wear this with a subtle jacket, denims, an understated belt and casual or sports shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
